required_preferences.fact: Preps simple, child-friendly lunches and snacks in the mornings with her grandchildren present — no longer does all meal prep the night before, adapts for active caregiving routine

supersedes.fact: Preps all meals the night before to manage dietary needs — never improvises meals last minute

required_preferences.fact: Follows a diet plan tailored by her nutritionist for blood sugar management — now avoids refined carbohydrates and sugary foods, not just processed frozen meals

supersedes.fact: Follows a low-sodium, Mediterranean-inspired diet — never eats processed frozen meals

required_preferences.fact: Uses voice-to-text apps or requests family assistance for personal journaling and correspondence while her dominant hand is immobilized
Prefers to coordinate and bring her brother his preferred home-cooked meals once a week to his assisted living facility
Prepares a homemade snack for her grandchildren each afternoon before homework, avoiding packaged options
Declines all paid consulting work; volunteers time exclusively to non-profit and community causes

persona: A retired finance professor who volunteers as a tax advisor
